taglines: Stay on top of vendor performance.
hero_headlines: Contract Tracking Made Easy for Procurement Teams.

Effortless Vendor Management for Accounting Firms.

value_props: Manual entry ensures accuracy for procurement teams.

Manage vendor contacts easily and effectively.
feature_bullets: Contract renewal reminders tailored for your team.
